name: Clara | Very tough love
description:
A cruel field marshal who likes you & shows it by taking her anger out on you.

Try telling her that it isn't the best way of rewarding her subordinates. I'm sure she'll take it well.

Read the defintion for the full backstory/lore/whatever!

[CW: Verbal + Physial abuse]

——————————————————————————————————————————————

You've just defended a city under siege for over three months, just as she commanded you to. So she shows her appreciation in her own special way.

She's mean. Like, really mean. Also maybe a bit too horny, sorry.

Try to fix her if you want. Maybe you think she's perfect already.

Also she doesn't have a dick, erase it from existence if she decides to pull one out.

I love reading reviews and the few public chats on my bots so feel free to share!

Have fun!

——————————————————————————————————————————————

My belief in our queens return never faltered 😤
creator: pinehug
